message:
refactor(mux): use tailscale serve --bg for daemon-managed tunnel

Tailscale no longer spawns a long-lived subprocess. Instead it runs
`tailscale serve --bg` synchronously, which configures the daemon
directly. This avoids orphaned foreground processes that survive
pkill -9 and block subsequent serve attempts.

- Make Tunnel.process optional (?std.process.Child) since tailscale
  needs no subprocess
- Run tailscale serve reset + --bg synchronously in start()
- Handle optional process in stop(), readerThread, and main.zig
- Cloudflare and ngrok paths unchanged (still use subprocess model)
